docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME *****(PETITION STRICKEN PER ORDER OF 3/29/07)***** FILED BY PETITIONER CROSS, ALEXANDER CROSBY FORMERLY KNOWN AS CROSBY ALEXANDER CROSS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CROSS, ALEXANDER CROSBY FORMERLY KNOWN AS CROSBY ALEXANDER CROSS HEARING SET FOR APR-19-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT CROSS, ALEXANDER CROSBY FORMERLY KNOWN AS CROSBY ALEXANDER CROSS HEARING SET FOR MAR-14-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ALEXANDER CROSS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ALEXANDER CROSBY CROSS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: JIROQUE; REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812 (206)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER CROSS, ALEXANDER CROSBY FORMERLY KNOWN AS CROSBY ALEXANDER CROSS
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PETITIONER CROSS, ALEXANDER CROSBY FORMERLY KNOWN AS CROSBY ALEXANDER CROSS
FEES NOT PAID. PETITION FILED ON 2/13/07 BY ALEXANDER CROSBY CROSS IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF APR-19-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR-NO APPEARANCE.
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE RECORDER) OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
